subject: Use integration-java11 Dockerfile
commit_message:
Use integration-java11 Dockerfile

Use onap/integration-java11:7.1.0 as a source for the images requiring JDK 11 in SDC

Issue-ID: SDC-3298
Change-Id: Ifee3d2942dcb9c078f2ebb686bdabc0ecca857b3
Signed-off-by: xuegao <xue.gao@intl.att.com>

Patch Set 23:

<verbose>true</verbose> 
produces A LOT of additional info, do we always need it,
maybe better to make this configurable, default FALSE, and change to TRUE in case of failure's investigation?

Patch Set 23:

> Patch Set 23:
> 
> <verbose>true</verbose> 
> produces A LOT of additional info, do we always need it,
> maybe better to make this configurable, default FALSE, and change to TRUE in case of failure's investigation?

I will use a variable to store verbose settings and make it false by default

Patch Set 24: Code-Review+1

As discussed with Xue and integration team, cassandra-init and onboard-init both requires cqlsh which requires python2 on alpine. So we can't update them as is. So suggest to let this review in and work on a new init container (maybe reuse asdctool only) to preload cassandra and become independent of cqlsh
